summary: Reviewed shard A's 16 cases for metadata/corpus analytics coherence. Recommend keeping Q001-Q012 as core metadata/corpus analytics, keeping Q065 only as a clearly labeled corpus-wide acronym search bridge, and moving or quarantining Q033-Q035 because their own lane metadata marks them as ordinary RAG text cluster-comparison cases.

outputs.description: proposal-only shard A review under parallel_team_worker_output.v1

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: These 12 cases consistently use lane=metadata_corpus_analytics, v10_or_extension_family=corpus_analytics_gate, answerability_source=csv_metadata_only_or_corpus_tool, seed_required=false, and sidecar blockers focused on aggregation correctness, CSV metadata visibility, and ordinary EDD exclusion.
execution_notes: Evaluate them as corpus/metadata analytics rather than ordinary passage-grounded RAG.
Expected answers should be scored against deterministic metadata/corpus computations where possible: counts, filters, sorting, grouping, and keyword matches.
Do not require retrieved body evidence unless the specific case asks for corpus keyword search beyond CSV metadata fields.

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: Q065 is not in the same corpus_analytics_gate family as Q001-Q012, but it still uses answerability_source=csv_metadata_only_or_corpus_tool and tests a corpus-wide ERP acronym search. It can broaden shard A without becoming ordinary RAG if scored as exact/variant acronym retrieval over metadata plus corpus text.
execution_notes: Label Q065 separately as v10_or_extension_family=acronym_corpus_search in any aggregate.
Require case-insensitive acronym matching and Korean/English title/body visibility metrics.
Do not let an LLM infer ERP relevance from generic enterprise-system semantics without matching evidence.

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: These three cases are marked lane=ordinary_rag_text, v10_or_extension_family=corpus_cluster_comparison, answerability_source=rag_text, and sidecar blockers body_visible_support/missing_required_claim/project_mixing. They ask for multi-document comparisons and common/different requirement synthesis, which is a different evaluation contract from metadata/corpus analytics.
accepted_fields_or_changes.fallback_if_no_swap_available: Keep them in the physical shard only as a quarantined secondary lane and exclude them from the shard A metadata analytics score. Report a separate ordinary_rag_text_cluster_comparison subtotal.
preferred_swap_profile: metadata-only counts by agency, amount, file type, notice type, or project category
corpus-wide keyword/acronym search with deterministic hit lists
filter/sort/group cases answerable from CSV metadata or explicitly indexed corpus text without synthesizing requirements across projects

required_tooling_or_sidecar_metrics: metadata_schema_visibility: confirm loaded columns for project/title, issuer/agency, budget/amount, file format, document type, and any category fields used by the questions
metadata_row_count_and_dedup: total corpus rows, unique project count, duplicate handling rule, and excluded rows
aggregation_correctness: deterministic expected count/list/top-n results for count, group, sort, and threshold-filter questions
budget_normalization: parse units such as won, million, billion, unknown/missing amount, and sort nulls consistently
file_format_count: deterministic PDF/HWP counts and mixed/unknown extension handling for Q012
keyword_hit_sidecar: exact query terms, normalized variants, fields searched, hit ids, and false-positive exclusions for domain/acronym cases
ordinary_edd_exclusion: a flag proving these cases were not judged by ordinary evidence-document-detection alone
answer_shape_check: expected answer type list/count/table/classification must match the case, with penalties for unsupported narrative synthesis

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: A single score across metadata aggregations, acronym search, and ordinary multi-document comparison would reward incompatible behaviors. Metadata cases should prioritize exactness/completeness of computed outputs; ordinary comparison cases should prioritize body support, scope separation, and required-claim coverage.
accepted_metric_split: acronym_corpus_search_score for Q065 or a subscore inside shard A
ordinary_rag_text_cluster_comparison_score for Q033-Q035 only if they remain quarantined

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Treating all 16 cases as one coherent metadata/corpus analytics shard
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: Q033-Q035 are ordinary RAG text comparison cases and would contaminate shard A's metadata analytics signal.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Using ordinary EDD or first-hit retrieval metrics as pass/fail for metadata aggregation questions
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: A model can retrieve a relevant document while failing the actual aggregate, count, sort, threshold, or file-format computation.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Allowing LLM semantic guessing for domain/category filters
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: Broad domain labels such as education, traffic, disaster/safety/security, health/welfare/insurance, culture/events, ODA, and ERP can be overfit by prompt prior unless the sidecar records exact fields searched, normalized term variants, and excluded false positives.
Budget sorting/filtering can be wrong if units, missing values, commas, Korean amount notation, or VAT-inclusive/exclusive fields are parsed inconsistently.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Scoring Q033-Q035 as metadata-only or corpus-keyword cases
rejected_or_risky_items.risk: They require multi-document body synthesis and comparison, so metadata-only tooling would under-test the intended behavior while ordinary RAG scoring would distort shard A.
The input note already warns not to compare across lanes as one strict score. The final runner should preserve that warning in summary outputs.

needs_orchestrator_review: Select replacement metadata/corpus analytics cases for Q033-Q035 if the 64-case bank must keep exactly 16 cases per shard with pure shard semantics.
Confirm whether Q065 should remain in shard A as an acronym-corpus bridge or move to a separate keyword/acronym shard if one exists.
Generate deterministic sidecar expected outputs for Q001-Q012 and Q065 before answer execution; otherwise mark shard A as diagnostic-only.
Preserve the input's diagnostic_candidate_only_not_yet_answer_run status until freeze/register is repeated with lane-specific scoring.

observed_results: Input shard contains 16 visible case records.
Prior contract examples use schema=parallel_team_worker_output.v1 with proposal.accepted_fields_or_changes and proposal.rejected_or_risky_items.
No existing worker output file was present in the target worker_outputs directory before this write.
